description: You are a media technician at an in-flight entertainment provider retrofitting a legacy video with an Audio Description (AD) track. Rename the existing audio track to 'Program' and create a new track named 'Narration'. Import '/home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav' onto the 'Narration' track, positioning it to begin at exactly 10.0 seconds (sample 441000). Duck the 'Program' track volume during the narration playback (10.0 to 20.0 seconds). Place a session marker named 'AD Start' at 10.0 seconds. Export the final stereo mix to '/home/ga/Audio/ife_mix/ad_mix.wav' and save the session.
